mappings.episodeTitle: Maths in the Early Islamic World
mappings.rationaleAI: Al-Khwarizmi's algebra (A.4), decimal notation (A.1.c).
Maxwell: electromagnetic theory (H.5), kinetic theory statistics (H.4).
Dirac equation unifying quantum mechanics with relativity (H.8, H.6).
Noether's theorem in mechanics (H.1), symmetry breaking in quantum field theory (H.8).
P vs NP: algorithms (G.1), computability (G.2), cryptography (F.4).
Antikythera Mechanism: analogue computation (A.6.b), celestial measurement (A.2.d).
Poincaré: Riemannian geometry (H.7), mechanics (H.1), differential equations (C.4).
Tycho Brahe: instruments (A.2.b), celestial data (A.2.d), astronomical tables (A.5.a).
Lovelace/Babbage: digital calculators (A.7.a), programmed computers (A.7.c), computer science (G).
Kinetic theory: statistical mechanics (H.4), particle mechanics (H.1).
Pascal: probability (B), Pascaline calculator (A.7.a), fluid dynamics (H.2).
Ptolemy's mathematical models (A.3), celestial measurement (A.2.d), planetary mechanics (H.1).
